name: tennis-partner-finder
description: 台北網球球伴地圖原型:以球場為單位,在地圖上顯示徵球伴需求與公開球友

scripts.test:session-unit: node --test tests/session-controller.test.js tests/session-create-form.test.js tests/session-data-boundary.test.js tests/session-route.test.js tests/local-supabase-config.test.js tests/notification-data-api.test.js tests/notification-dispatch.test.js tests/notification-push.test.js tests/player-presence.test.js tests/reset-local-test-db.test.js
scripts.test:mock: npm run test:session-unit && TENNIS_TEST_HARNESS_MODE=mock playwright test --project=desktop-chromium --project=mobile-chromium
scripts.test:local: RUN_LOCAL_SUPABASE_API_TEST=1 node --test tests/session-data-local-api.test.js && TENNIS_TEST_HARNESS_MODE=local playwright test --project=supabase-chromium
